---
title: "Using Covariates for Experiments"
description: "If the treatment is randomized, why do we need covariates?"
date: "2025-11-30"
toc: false
categories:
  - Causal Inference
---

- These are slides for a weekly presentation during my research fellowship at the Golub Capital Social Impact Lab, Stanford GSB, made by myself.

---

- [Slides](../../ref/covariates_presentation.html)
